name: Almond and Honey Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat the oven to 200°C.
2. Butter and flour a tart tin with a removable base of 22 cm in diameter.
3. Roll out the pastry to fit the tart tin. Line the tin with the pastry and prick the bottom all over with a fork.
4. Bake the pastry shell for 10 minutes at the bottom of the pre-heated oven. Leave the pastry shell in the tin.
5. Lightly brush a thin layer of apricot glaze over the bottom of the pastry shell.
6. Put all the remaining ingredients for the filling into a saucepan and heat them gently, stirring to mix them well as they melt.
7. Raise the oven to 210°C. When the filling is melted, spread it in a thin layer on the glazed pastry shell.
8. Cook the cake for about 15 minutes: it is ready when the filling begins to bubble.
9. Leave the cake to cool in its tin, then take it out.
10. Cut the cake into little triangles or rectangular pieces. Serve them with coffee, like 'petits fours'.
